pageContext.name: The Chariot 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Ride to Victory with our New Tarot Coin!  This splendid 1oz pure silver coin is the eighth release in our popular Tarot Card Collection. The Chariot represents willpower and determination and suggests that you can achieve success by keeping the focus on the task at hand and remaining confident in your abilities.   The coin showcases colored artwork and a detailed engraving of The Chariot and is shaped to mimic a Tarot card. A mirror finish surrounds the coin to further enhance the design. The obverse features a beautiful, engraved border that frames the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, confirming it as legal tender.   The coin arrives in a specially designed, navy-blue case that opens like a book to reveal the coin inside. A Certificate of Authenticity is printed on the box, along with the coin's unique number in the mintage of just 2,000. Printed on the inside front cover is the meaning behind the card.   Take this piece as an encouragement for moving forward. Order today!
